ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number of the property */,
  "asking_price" REAL /* Asking price of the property */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in asking price compared to previous value */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "living_size" TEXT /* Living area size of the property */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Total days the property has been on the market */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment, condo) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, needs repair) */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "garage_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can accommodate */,
  "heating_system" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., central, electric) */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system (e.g., central, window units) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the real estate agent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the agent works for */,
  "agent_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  "licensing_state" TEXT /* State where the agent is licensed */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the agent's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction took place */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was finalized */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate charged by the agent */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Amount of commission earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the trend */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Historical price of the property on the recorded date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., MLS, Zillow) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "forecasted_price" REAL /* Forecasted price for the next period */,
  "forecast_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that was favorited */,
  "date_favorited" TEXT /* Date the property was added to favorites */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes the user has added about the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
